text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Rudolf, the student council doesn't need you
today. No sitting in your usual chair.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You left out all the context, Brian! Good grief...
Sorry about that, President.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Any council work that needs doing today, Brian
and I can take care of. So please, take the day off
to relax.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Haha! I see, very well then. You had me worried
for a second there. I thought I was being ejected
from the student council.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But then again... Well, hm. Though I appreciate
the sentiment...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...I would like to pop into the office now and then—feel free to pretend I'm not there. You wouldn't mind that, would you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Already getting lonely? Some "emperor"
you are.
